storyInfo: Mifune takes Hannya and the deed to Kajimachi from Tessai by taking Tetsuya hostage. He kidnaps Momoka and Kichisei, and even livestreams his killing of Tessai to Tetsuya. Hoshiguma arrives to find a dying Tessai, and the demolition of Kajimachi begins.

attributes.content: Tessai-san has been inside for quite a while. I'm starting to get worried...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Don't worry about him. The Old Man at his forge is like you singing on stage, Hoshiguma punching someone, or me at a pachinko machine.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Are you really good at pachinko?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Ah—hehe...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Trying to change the subject, Kichisei takes a cookie from the plate in front of her and puts it in her mouth.
Uh oh, I've almost eaten all the cookies.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Why are all the cookies here Ninomiya's classic cystymilk flavor? Is it Tessai-san's favorite?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Tetsuya used to like it.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: If Tetsuya realized what kind of man Kinbee was...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: He would have realized it a long time ago if he could.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: To be fair, Tetsuya following Kinbee around is really just the effect. The root cause goes back to Old Man Tessai—
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: If only Tessai had half your wisdom, Kichisei-san.
Kinbee?!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Go inside, Momoka! I'll hold him off!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Let's not rush to a fight, kiddo.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: My, my. How honored I am, to be welcomed by the oyabun himself.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Where is Hoshiguma?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: She is enjoying the hospitality of my people, and is unable to help you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Despicable scum!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Blame yourself. I was trying to bait her with Moriuchi, but she bit the hook before I even had time to set the bait.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But I don't like to kill unless I have to. These are more civilized times.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm here to extend a sincere invitation to Chairman Tessai to attend my accession ceremony.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Your what?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You heard me.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If Chairman Tessai will not hand over Kajimachi whatsoever, then I must take the small liberty of taking over the leadership of the Kinsekikai. After all, the position is already little more than a figurehead.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If you are too embarrassed to attend, you can simply hand over Hannya, and the ceremony can take place without you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Hannya is not the symbol of succession, never was!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: It is if everyone believes it is.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You favored Hoshiguma too much. You never even realized it, did you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Or did you choose to give Hannya to Hoshiguma before she went to Lungmen for the sole purpose of snubbing me? What did she have that I didn't, that you would detest me so?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You think too highly of yourself.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Yes! That's what I wanted to hear!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: It's not that I think too highly of myself, Old Man. You look down on everyone except for your beloved Hoshiguma!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Standing alone at the door, Mifune laughs.
Momoka and Kichisei slowly move back behind Tessai.
Perhaps your son would not have turned against you if I told you this sooner.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Why bring up Tetsuya? Did you think I opposed you in order to pass leadership onto that kid? He's not made for it.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I know. He's another one you look down on.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Enough talk. I may not be able to beat you, but it's not so hard to stall you until Hoshiguma gets back. This is my house, after all.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Also, it'll be a good chance to try out the reforged Hannya.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Tameshigiri? Wonderful.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I have something to show you before that, though.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune reaches into his clothes.
Tessai keeps a careful eye on his movements, but all Mifune does is take out a few photos, casually tossing them to the floor.
Tessai catches a glimpse of one of the photos, which falls face-up in front of him—
Tetsuya?!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Tetsuya.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Such a good boy. He did everything I asked of him to the limits of his ability, whether he could ultimately handle it or not.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: For example, he really did find the Northern Court spy... himself.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Why—you?!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I was surprised when I first saw the photos, but then it started to make sense.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Tetsuya's mother may have missed her family in the north, but she steadfastly refused any approach to become a spy.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Yet the mark of Hoashi was on all the weapons that we, the Kinsekikai, procured in secret.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: My fault, I suppose. The Kinsekikai's TV station wasn't as powerful as it is now, and those who wanted a piece of the Kinsekikai would have set upon the news like hungry beasts.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Eventually, I helped you find a place for the weapons, but you had to take care of the aftermath. You were forced to place the blame on Tetsuya's mother, as you once placed it on Hoshiguma.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: To you, the Kinsekikai is the King on the shogi board.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You will preserve it at all costs, never hesitating to cut other pieces loose, be it a Queen like Hoshiguma, or Promoted Rooks like me that you look down on.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm curious myself... what does Tetsuya mean to you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Is he a Rook? A Bishop? Or is he so incompetent that you see him as a Pawn you wouldn't mind losing?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If that was really so, we would have to have a fight here and now. But he isn't, is he?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He is incompetent, but he's not a shogi piece. He's your precious son, not to be placed on the board—
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Shut up!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Clearly on edge, the old man seems ready to charge at Mifune with shield raised at any moment.
But Mifune can see Hannya trembling in his hands.
His mother's name will never be cleared. If the same fate befalls your only remaining child...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I said, SHUT UP!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: You're hesitating. You're contemplating whether there's a chance the reforged Hannya will allow you to neutralize me in one blow, and bargain my life for Tetsuya's.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Chance. What an obnoxious word.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Are you scared?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Unfortunately for you, there is more than one person who carries out my will.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm not claiming strength in numbers, but the moment you swing Hannya at me, a button will be pressed, and these photos will show up on Kinseki Channel.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: And you'll be free, once and for all, when Tetsuya realizes that he was right, and his father never cared about him, just as his father never cared about his mother.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What do you say, Old Man?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What do you say, Old Man?
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: No, it's not true! It can't be!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Tell me this isn't real!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Tetsuya frantically shakes the shoulders of the ninja who brought him here, but he cannot even tell if the ninja is looking at him.
After so many years, you have finally delivered Hannya into the hands of its true master.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Unfortunately, I still have to complete certain task entrusted to me. Where is the deed to Kajimachi? No rush, the one who gave me the task wanted it done cleanly. For now, you can simply follow me.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Those two...
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: The girls? I'm certainly willing to do you a favor, since you've been cooperative so far. Come quietly, and I'll spare their lives.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: You can go to hell, Kinbee! I'll cut your tail off and make a belt out of it—
attributes.name: Kichisei's Voice

attributes.content: Kichisei!
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: His father's angry voice comes through the TV's speakers somewhat distorted, giving the scene a sense of surrealness.
Papa... Papa!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Where are you taking him? Let him go! You want to get me, come for me! Why him? Why?!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Mio-san. Where is the Ao-Oni?
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: Mifune-san's orders were to let her go when the time is right, and allow her to return to Kajimachi.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: What of the boy? When do we let him go? Or are there other plans?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I don't know. The orders from upstairs were to keep him in the room, and don't let him break anything in it. I wasn't told anything else.
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: I see.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Mio-san... see, I'm not sure how long I'll have to watch him, and I was up all night last night... I'm very tired, to tell the truth...
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: You can go.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Arigatou!
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: What's on the TV?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Let me go.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: I asked a question.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Let me go!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Mifune-san's orders are that you are not to leave this room.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: My father's gone with your people! He's yielded! What else do you want?!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: I'm simply following orders.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: The young Oni draws his bokutou, but the ethereal hand emerging from behind the Liberi easily brings him to the ground.
Don't waste your energy.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Won't you say something, Chairman Tessai?
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Have you decided to stay silent for now? Suit yourself, as long as you speak when I tell you to.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: The camera follows Tessai.
Tetsuya sees his father leave the manor and enter a car stopped in front of its gate.
After a short while, the door of the car opens. Through an unremarkable door is a splendorous meeting hall.
What's this place?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Auction hall.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Auctioning what? Kajimachi? You don't mean my father's...?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: The next item for auction is not listed in the catalog. It was added at the last minute.
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: I present... the very first ever TV set manufactured by the Kinseki Group!
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: Starting at... s-seven million!
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: A TV set that looks so unremarkable, yet starting at the remarkable price of two thousand ryou... there must be something extraordinary about it!
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: Seven million, five hundred thousand.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Kouhei Mifune san? Are you serious?
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: Of course.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: I doubt I'm the only one who recognizes its value.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: A-Are you sure?
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: Regardless... we have a bid for seven million, five hundred thousand from Kouhei Mifune-san!
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: Seven million five hundred thousand going once... seven million five hundred thousand going twice...
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: ...Ten million.
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: In the middle of the screen, the aging Oni slowly raises the paddle in his hand.
His old, feeble voice comes through the TV speakers.
That's... Chairman Tessai of the Kinsekikai?!
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: What did Mifune say... fifteen million? He's still raising the bid? What is he trying to do, kill my father by putting him into debt?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: The Liberi says nothing, but the young man sees a hint of pity in her eyes that goes a little further than what the number 'fifteen million' should elicit.
Two hundred million?! You are bidding two hundred million, Tessai-san?!
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: Two...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Two hundred million?!
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Two hundred million going once... two hundred million going twice... Last chance at two hundred million... sold.
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: Tetsuya watches as Tessai rises from his seat and walks past rows of well-dressed buyers, towards the TV set that should have belonged to him to begin with.
Tessai-san, there is still paperwork to be done...
attributes.name: Auctioneer's Voice

attributes.content: Tessai ignores the auctioneer and gently lifts the TV set, the way he did when he marketed it to potential buyers, one-at-a-time, many years ago.
Tetsuya raises his bokutou again.
He charges at Mio in desperation, but is once again thrown easily to the floor.
Again, and again...
The TV set continues to mercilessly send distorted sounds into the room.
The sound of camera shutters, of people giving a show of applauding, of footsteps, of the rustling of pen on paper, of car doors shutting, of car engines rumbling.
The now-unfamiliar sound of the door to his father's manor.
Tetsuya has lost count of how many times he has gotten back up after being thrown to the ground by Mio. He charges futilely again, when he hears the voices behind him.
One, like a ghost; the other, like a man-eating Akki.
Voices that hardly even seem human anymore.
Now, give me the deed.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Sign here, stamp your handprint, and all will be done.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: You still can't do it, can you?
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: But you understand that none of it is over, until you've put your palm to the page.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: And what happens when I do?
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: The deed to Kajimachi will become the collateral on a loan in the amount of two hundred million. The TV set is yours, once you give the payment to the auction house—
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: It's Tetsuya that I'm talking about!
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: Him? Same as always. Those photos of him will be sealed away forever.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: You'll never be able to pay back the debt. We can keep this secret together, and he'll be none the wiser.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: The two people in the room with the TV both freeze.
Even the Liberi, who should have seen plenty of such things, takes an involuntary step backward.
You liar!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: He's a liar! Mifune is a liar! Don't do it! No!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: I know. It's not easy, choosing between abandoning your son and a crushing debt.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Money? I don't care about money...
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: Money. Business. Titles. Land. None of that matters anymore.
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: But only this... bowing my head to rotten scum like you...
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: And yet bow you will.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Bow you will, for the Tetsuya you failed to save from the rampaging Akki, and for the other Tetsuya you almost made a traitor out of.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Promise me. You won't kill Tetsuya, or Hoshiguma, or those two girls.
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: I won't.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: He tricked me! He tricked me! Don't let him trick you!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: You're the oyabun of the Kinsekikai! You're Tessai the Kingpin! You're my father! Papa! Papa!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: This isn't supposed to happen! This isn't who you are!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: You're the villain who can turn Mitsukue's yakuza upside-down with a wave of your hand! You're the steel-hearted murderer who killed my mother! This isn't who you are!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Papa—
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: As the old man places his hand on the inkpad, then leaves his red handprint on the paper, it seems like all life has been sucked out of him.
Good. Very good.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: By the way, your son just saw everything that happened, from beginning to end. I'm sure he'll be grateful to you. No need to thank me.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: You—how dare you?!
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: Your son thought he was the same as me. He thought you always looked down on him as you looked down on me, thinking of him as a worthless substitute.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: I hope he learned his lesson, and stops thinking of himself as the most pitiable man under Heaven.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: How lucky he is, to have someone willing to trample the last vestige of his own dignity for him.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: A wave of the fan, and the hand-printed sheet is cut in half, but Mifune continues to sneer.
The image on the TV starts shaking. Something seems to have moved the camera.
Here's the camera.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: You... you deceived me? You let Tetsuya know about all this... you never meant to spare him?
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: Why? Why would you deceive Hoshiguma, deceive me, deceive Tetsuya?!
attributes.name: Tessai's Voice

attributes.content: 'Deceive' is such a strong word.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Hoshiguma learned that her choice was only ever wishful thinking.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Tetsuya learned that you did love him, after all.
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: And you—you understand now, don't you?
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: Mitsukue no longer needs you or the hypocrisy of the Kinsekikai. Everything you've done was to fool yourself—
attributes.name: Mifune's Voice

attributes.content: A loud noise comes through the speakers as the camera is smashed. The screen goes dark, but the speakers continue to mercilessly communicate the sound.
The sound of Tessai's fan clashing with Mifune's sword.
The sound of labored footsteps.
The sound of blade impaling flesh.
...Papa?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: The sound of blood dripping.
Papa—
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: The sound of a body hitting the floor.
Papa!!!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Die on the battlefield... or... or die fighting cops, die to my vengeful blade! Don't die like this—
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Don't—
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Don't die for me like this—humiliated... trampled beneath another man's feet...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Y-You don't deserve to be my father. But I don't deserve to have you die for me like this!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Why would you do this for me? Why would you do this for a fool?!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Papa...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Mifune-san...?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Yes, I took over from the ninja.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: His reaction...? I'm sure you can imagine.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You... you have no further use for him?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: —Yes! What other orders do you have?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Yes, I will go to the place where Momoka is being held.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: But was there not someone else? The woman by the name of Kichisei—
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Mio, is it?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Mifune told you to kill me, didn't he?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: He wants to wrap things up cleanly. He doesn't want any loose ends, does he?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Then do it. Kill me here and now.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Otherwise, I'll kill you with my tooth and nail, whatever it takes to get out of here.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Go.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Go. Before I change my mind.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Never come back.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Has the sun set?
Tessai does not know.
He has lost track of time.
He remembers falling to Mifune's blade. He remembers Mifune grabbing his hand and leaving a bloody handprint on a new contract.
Then, the footsteps grow distant, and his vision grows grey and blurry.
He wants to be free of all this—
Uncle Tessai?!

The old man stands back up feebly as he hears the familiar voice, perhaps out of guilt, perhaps out of lingering sentiment, perhaps because he does not want Hoshiguma to see the true extent of his weakness.
...Hoshiguma?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Who did this? Kinbee?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma... I couldn't protect Kajimachi... or Hannya...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Where's Momoka? Kichisei?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kinbee was right about one thing... sitting in my chair... I started thinking of everything as shogi pieces...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Moving them... trading them... sacrificing them...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: But I forgot... I'm no more than a shogi piece myself, in the eyes of others...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Run... you're no match for Kinbee... leave this forsaken place... go back... go back to Lungmen...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: No, I won't!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sit down, Uncle Tessai. I'll find a doctor—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma
Tessai
attributes.content: *cough* *cough* Don't... bother...

attributes.name: Tessai
attributes.content: Can't you see... I'm beyond help...?
attributes.joined: *cough* *cough* Don't... bother... Can't you see... I'm beyond help...?

attributes.content: Uncle Tessai—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm here, Uncle Tessai. I'm not going anywhere.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sit down. We'll sit together for a little bit... just like old times.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma helps the dying old man sit down.
She casts her gaze toward the tall walls in the distance. There are lights flashing outside, and the sound of tracks rolling over the ground.
She does not care what it means. Kajimachi is dead, and she cares not what will become of it later.
All she knows is that she must stay with the dying man.
The old man's breathing grows weaker and weaker, but he begins to feel the rumbling of tracks too.
He looks up in terror, but his eyes can no longer see. The ground trembles beneath him.
Is that... a sound... I can't hear...?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: What is it, Hoshiguma... what is it...?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: It's—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma stops in mid-sentence, choking back tears.
After a while, she growls from the back of her throat—
It's the signal... to begin the fireworks show.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The fireworks... have begun?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Yes. They're getting ready. You hear the commotion, don't you?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Yes... Kajimachi hasn't been so lively... in a long time...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: A smile appears on the old man's face.
An engineering vehicle rams through the manor's walls, causing the beams to shake violently.
Not too far away, the pachinko parlor's machines are crushed to pieces, sending tiny balls flying everywhere.
Do you hear... the fireworks...?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Yes...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: The sound of fireworks going off, taiko drums rumbling, the noise of the crowd.
He feels the trembling of the ground again, its joyful dance.
He hears the faint sound of car horns, from vehicles caught in the traffic jam outside.
He senses his own heartbeat growing slower by the second.
No...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: No... I can't...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: In his final moments, his heart races once more, and hot blood flows swift through his veins, as the dying man gazes at the sunset, thinking that it is the rising sun—
The wrinkled hands fall weakly.
Found the body that the witness reported... and the suspect, matching the description of Hoshiguma!
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: Was this part of Kinbee's plan too?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Shut up and come with us.
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: Calling the police, letting you see me with Uncle Tessai as he draws his last breath, so that I'll once again be suspected of murder...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Was this part of Kinbee's plan too?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Did his people call you?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...I see.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma takes a leap and sees a familiar foe before the policeman says anything.
Yakuza. Ninja.
You're in league with each other?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The policeman looks down at his own feet—as Hoshiguma swings her unsheathed sword, trying to cut a path through the faint but inevitable dusk.
